The '''Battle of Artus Prime''' occurred in [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]] between the [[Empire Reborn]] and [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] forces on the [[Artus Prime]] [[Artus Prime Mining Facility|mining facility]].

==Background==
The Empire Reborn fleet captured the mining colony on the planet Artus Prime. With its main export of Force-sensitive [[Artusian crystal]]s the mine was a vital target in the [[Shadowtrooper]] project. The miners became prisoners and test subjects for the force crystal experiments.<ref name="Outcast" />

[[File:Sabotaaaage.jpg|thumb|left|[[Kyle Katarn]] sabotages the mining operation before the battle.|204x204px]]
After the [[Kejim Outpost]] investigation, [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]] sent the mercenaries [[Kyle Katarn]] and [[Jan Ors]] to [[Artus Prime]] to infiltrate the hostile grounds and confirm the mining of Artusian crystals. They discovered arrayed against them nearly 230 Imperials with three [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|ATSTs]] and [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]].<ref name="Outcast" />

==The Battle==
Katarn entered the facility and, battling hostile forces, released the prisoners from their cells, who soon armed themselves. They attempted to escape, but the main gate was closed and guarded by three [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-ST]] walkers, one in the canyon, another on the higher level near the main gate, and another in a hangar at the other end of the canyon. Katarn eliminated the walkers using the base's [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]]. He then turned off powerful [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]] that protected the ion cannons, then moved on to use the turbolasers to destroy the ion cannons to allow the New Republic fleet to enter the system.<ref name="Outcast" />

[[File:Artusbat.jpg|thumb|left|A shootout between several prisoners and stormtroopers.|209x209px]]

With the ion cannons destroyed, Jan Ors was able to touch down on the colony with the ''[[Raven's Claw]]'' while the Republic deployed an evacuation transport for the prisoners. Upon landing, Ors was captured by the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Desann]]. Realizing something was wrong, Katarn fought his way to the landing pad. It was actually a trap for Katarn. Once [[Tavion Axmis|Tavion]], Desann's apprentice, had secured Ors and taken her inside Desann's shuttle, an enraged Katarn attacked Desann, but without a lightsaber or a connection to the Force, he was easily defeated. Hoisted off the ground by Desann and mocked by the Dark Jedi, Katarn threatened Desann when he suggested that Ors would hold up to experiments better than the Artus Prime colonists. Upon hearing these words, Desann ordered Tavion to kill Ors. Katarn heard Ors's scream as Tavion appeared to kill Ors, bringing out Katarn's rage. Desann threw him aside and fled with Tavion in his shuttle.<ref name="Outcast" />

==Aftermath==
Provoked by Desann's taunt about how weak he had become, Katarn traveled to the [[Valley of the Jedi]] to reclaim his force powers, with the Dark Jedi secretly following him. The Republic fleet reclaimed the [[Artus Prime Mining Facility|mining colony]] after bombarding it.<ref name="Outcast" />

==Behind the scenes==
The mission appears in the [[2002]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]''.
